name: RABBIT-FILE-BACKLOG-8
title: No way to view full item.json from CLI; only status get exists
description: item-status.py get only prints the status field. To see the full item (history, description, priority, filed_by, etc.), users must inspect the bug-backlog-files branch manually. Add an item-status.py 'show' or 'view' subcommand that pretty-prints the entire fetched item.json, or a list-items.py --verbose / --json flag.
